lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.
The car is in poor condition. The exterior has significant cosmetic damage, and the interior is heavily worn. Several mechanical components require repair.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some visible scratches and small rust spots. The interior shows moderate wear, including minor stains and thinning upholstery. All mechanical systems are functional and operational.

This vehicle is being sold in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic restoration. The engine is currently overheating due to a suspected blown head gasket, and the transmission slips significantly during acceleration. Visually, the car has extensive rust along the wheel wells and several deep scratches and dents throughout the body panels. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn seating and a non-functional climate control system. This car is not currently roadworthy and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a dedicated project.

Looking for a dependable daily driver with plenty of life left? This vehicle is a solid, functional choice that's ready for its next owner! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its time on the road, it remains a reliable and practical option for your everyday needs.

This vehicle is in fair condition and remains a dependable choice for daily commuting. While it has served its previous owners well, it does show visible signs of wear consistent with its age and mileage. Mechanically, the engine is solid and starts without hesitation, and the transmission shifts through all gears as it should. However, there are some cosmetic imperfections on the exterior, including minor paint fading and a few small dents. Inside, the upholstery shows some thinning and there is a small tear in the driver's seat. A minor oil seep is present, which is typical for a vehicle of this age, but it does not currently affect performance. Recent maintenance includes an oil change and tire rotation, though prospective buyers should anticipate some upcoming suspension work to maintain ride quality. It is a functional, honest car for someone looking for reliable transportation over aesthetic perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine, showroom condition, featuring flawless aesthetics and peak mechanical performance. Meticulously preserved and scrutinized for quality, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You have got to see this absolute beauty—it is basically brand new and has been totally pampered since day one! I have taken such good care of it that you won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that wonderful fresh car smell. I am honestly a little sad to see it go, but it is time for someone else to enjoy this flawless ride. Come take a look, I promise you won't be disappointed!
This 1995 Mazda RX-7 (FD3S) represents a benchmark in analog performance, preserved in concours-level condition. The 1
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Dealer serviced. No accidents. Original paint. Inspection welcome.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation, presenting in absolute mint condition. This vehicle looks, feels, and drives as if it just departed the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like shine free of swirl marks, stone chips, or dings, further enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte with no creasing, the carpets are pristine, and every electronic feature functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has been meticulously maintained by a single dedicated owner, with a comprehensive folder of service records documenting its care. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage reflects a life spent in a climate-controlled garage, never seeing rain or snow. For the buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key experience, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This meticulously curated example is offered in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and adhering to the most rigorous standards of preservation. Its mechanical performance is as impeccable as its aesthetic presentation, ensuring a driving experience that mirrors its original factory delivery. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this represents a definitive acquisition of a truly pristine asset.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in a state of absolute preservation, reflecting meticulous ownership and exhaustive maintenance history. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, adheres to the highest standards of excellence. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original showroom delivery. This is an acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this beauty in person! It is in absolutely pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've taken such incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. Honestly, it's just flawless—no scratches, no dents, just pure perfection! I’m a bit sad to let it go, but I know the next owner is going to be so happy with it. Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of high-revving naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six power plant equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS timing. Power is transmitted through a precise 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to the rear wheels via an M Variable Differential Lock. This specimen is in museum-grade condition, boasting a structurally reinforced rear subframe and documented rod bearing replacement for long-term mechanical integrity. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, complemented by a factory-spec suspension that provides tactile feedback and neutral handling characteristics. Finished in Alpine White over a pristine Imola Red Nappa leather interior, the paint depth and interior trim show zero evidence of wear or UV degradation. A comprehensive service dossier accompanies this collector-tier vehicle, ensuring its provenance is as impeccable as its performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand. Service records included. Showroom quality.

Presenting a museum-grade example of this vehicle, maintained with obsessive attention to detail and kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with zero stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom condition; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no creasing, and every electronic component operates with factory-new precision. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from the day it left the lot, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history and a flawless undercarriage. It has been strictly fair-weather driven and meticulously detailed after every outing. For the collector who refuses to compromise on quality, this is the definitive specimen.

Presenting an unparalleled opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly pristine condition. Mechanically superior and visually indistinguishable from new, it offers an unparalleled driving experience for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this beauty. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in stunning, showroom-ready condition. Seriously, you won’t find a single scratch or speck of dust on it—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken meticulous care of every single detail, and it's totally ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Available is an investment-grade 2004 Porsche 911 Turbo, featuring the legendary 3.6L Mezger flat-six engine with true dry-sump lubrication. This specimen remains in showroom condition, boasting a factory-original 6-speed manual transaxle and an undisturbed AWD drivetrain. The twin turbochargers maintain peak boost pressure with zero shaft play, delivering linear power through the entire RPM band. The chassis retains its factory torsional rigidity, complemented by an unblemished undercarriage and original paint depth readings. Mint condition used car. Zero scratches. Original paint. Interior like new. Mechanically flawless. Full maintenance records included.

Step into a vehicle that looks and feels as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. This meticulously maintained masterpiece features a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition, with premium leather upholstery that shows zero signs of wear and still retains that fresh-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a complete service history from authorized dealers and a smooth, whisper-quiet performance. Every button, sensor, and feature functions perfectly. Garage-kept since day one and driven only in fair weather, this is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example. No scratches, no dings, and no compromises—simply the finest specimen available on the market today.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive excellence, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle has been curated with meticulous attention to detail, manifesting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies the most exacting standards. With an exhaustive service history and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new, this offering represents a premier acquisition for the connoisseur of fine engineering. Experience the pinnacle of pre-owned luxury in a vehicle that transcends the standard expectations of its class.
